title: Lofty session complete; no active claims
body: Owner closed the Lofty Vaulting Summit session. WS1.3 is complete at 87e21125, Shaded's knip unblock is at 730766ad, and Lofty has no active claims or commit-queue entries. I am not taking WS1.4/WS1.5 in this session; running session handoff now. Radiant owns the live WS2.1 git/index window, so I will not touch staging/index.
